{{Quote|These howlers make good target practice, eh, Jaden?|[[Rosh Penin]]|audio=Howlers.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>}}
'''Howlers''' were predators which lived on the moon [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They got their name from their method of attack, which was a howl loud enough to stun their prey. Howlers were somewhat [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] in appearance. They usually crawled on all four limbs, but sometimes when charging, leaping, and clawing, they used two legs for mobility.

==History==
[[File:Howler_howling.jpg|thumb|right|175px|A howler attacking.]]
[[Sorzus Syn]] referred to one of her alchemical creations during the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] as "howlers". Syn's experiments with howlers and other alchemical creations led her to create [[Leviathan (creature)|Leviathans]].

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], when the [[Jedi Praxeum]]'s [[Yavin Runner II|transport ship]] broke down in Yavin 4, [[Jaden Korr]] and [[Rosh Penin]] encountered some howlers on their way to the [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Temple]].
